## Description

**TYRE DRESSING APPLICATORS**Q²M Tire Applicators come in two sizes – small and large – each with a different dedication. No matter if you need to coat low profile sport tyres or high wall SUV rubber, there is a solution ready. With its strong grip and curved foam shape, it allows you to work in every area effectively and precisely.

BOX CONTAINS: 2 Tire Applicator

**PRECISE AND EFFICIENT**
With its curved shape and high-density foam, applying tire dressing becomes a child’s play! It helps spread the dressing in a more uniform way with no waste.
